title: Beetroot Medley Light Curry
description: A spicy and light Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring beetroot and other vegetables in a low-sodium-friendly curry sauce, perfect for a monsoon evening.

ingredients.name: 2 cups mixed leafy greens (e.g., kale, collard greens)
1 inch ginger root, peeled and grated
2 tablespoons low-sodium soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Low in sodium, for added depth of flavor

instructions: Toss spinach, beetroot, mixed greens, bell peppers, red onion, garlic, ginger in coconut milk.
Place mixture on a baking sheet and roast for about 20-25 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
In a separate pan, heat low-sodium soy sauce over medium heat. Add lemon juice and stir well to combine.
Gently simmer the sauce for about 5 minutes until slightly thickened.
Stir in roasted vegetable mixture and cooked sauce, adjusting seasoning with salt and pepper as needed.
Serve hot or at room temperature as a light curry dish.
